sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Let me check what was collected - how many blue dots remain and where the white dot is now.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
white = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'W']
blue_dots = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 1]
orange_dots = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'O' and n['pixels'] == 1]
red_dots = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'r' and n['pixels'] == 1]

print("White dot:", [n['boundary'] for n in white])
print("Blue dots remaining:", len(blue_dots), [n['boundary'] for n in blue_dots])
print("Orange dots remaining:", len(orange_dots))
print("Red dots remaining:", len(red_dots))

# Check blue cross position
blue_cross = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] > 10]
if blue_cross:
    print("Blue cross boundary:", blue_cross[0]['boundary'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: TOOL RESULT: python
sections.content:
White dot: [[[48, 27]]]
Blue dots remaining: 0 []
Orange dots remaining: 46
Red dots remaining: 39
Blue cross boundary: [[35, 27], [47, 27]]

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
All 4 blue dots collected! The blue cross is now at (48, 27). Now I need to collect the orange and red dots.
Orange targets: (39, 9), (42, 24), (57, 9) - need to use orange X
Red targets: (3, 21), (9, 27) - need to use red diamond
Let me switch to the orange X first. SPACE cycles: blue cross → orange X → red diamond → ...
Actually, I need to figure out the cycle order. From what I've seen:
- Orange X (18, 27) → SPACE → Red diamond (30, 39) → SPACE → Blue cross (42, 48)
So the cycle is: orange X → red diamond → blue cross → orange X → ...
Currently at blue cross, so SPACE → orange X.
For the orange X, I need to collect (39, 9), (42, 24), (57, 9). The orange X has diagonal arms. I need to figure out the arm length and how to position the X to collect these dots.
But wait - the orange X was moved earlier from (18, 27) to (21, 27) by my DOWN press. So its current center is at (21, 27), not (18, 27).
Let me switch to orange X and plan from there.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# All 4 blue dots collected! Now collect orange and red dots.
# Switch to orange X
action(['SPACE'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
